text:
Market today: Tech is the main driver, with AI chatter and chip news moving the needle. Your concentrated tech/chip book is sensitive to this.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL (down 24.46%) - leveraged ETFs decay, and this one is showing weakness. SPAL is also concerning (down 27.71%), another leveraged ETF that needs watching.

Watch: SK Hynix's strong Nasdaq debut and Meta's AI optimism are key.

Bottom line: Keep a close eye on your leveraged positions and the AI narrative.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or exiting this leveraged position given its current status and decay risk.
SPAL: Monitor this leveraged ETF closely; consider reducing exposure if it continues to trend down.
No new buys today - hold and watch
